title: Anthropic Upgrades Claude Voice Mode: Supports Opus/Sonnet/Haiku Switching, Directly Access External Applications Such as Gmail and Notion
excerpt: Several weeks after OpenAI launched its new generation of dialogue models and upgraded the voice function of ChatGPT, Anthropic officially released a major upda
content_html:
Several weeks after OpenAI launched its new generation of dialogue models and upgraded the voice function of ChatGPT, Anthropic officially released a major update to the Claude voice mode on July 23. Users can now freely switch between three different model levels: Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku. The voice mode will default to automatically matching the fastest version based on the last model used in text chats.

Upgrading from simple voice to a versatile assistant

The Claude voice mode was first launched last year, previously driven by the faster but limited Haiku model by default. Although it responded quickly, it was not suitable for handling complex tasks. This upgrade significantly improved performance in long conversations. According to the official statement, the new voice mode can provide targeted feedback on users' communication styles, help users practice customer pitches, and even jointly develop product market research plans. A bigger highlight is the ability to integrate with application ecosystems. The system can directly call third-party applications such as Gmail, Google Calendar, Slack, Canva, and Notion. Users can update meeting schedules, draft emails, or create new documents in Notion through voice commands.

In contrast, although OpenAI has updated the tone and expression style of the voice, it still cannot directly call external tools to collaborate on actual work. In terms of language support, the Claude voice mode now supports ten languages including English, French, German, Japanese, and Korean, and users need to manually switch to the specified language. The new voice mode is now available for Beta testing users on all platforms. Free users can only use the Haiku model and connect to a maximum of one external application. However, Anthropic did not change the underlying voice architecture in this update and did not reveal specific voice technology stacks. There may be no substantial improvements in natural conversation experiences such as interruption handling.

sentences.zh: 不过，Anthropic 在本次更新中并没有改变底层语音架构，也没有透露具体的语音技术栈。

sentences.zh: 自然对话体验（例如中断处理）可能没有实质性改进。

content_html_zh:
继OpenAI推出新一代对话模型并升级ChatGPT语音功能几周后，Anthropic于7月23日正式发布了Claude语音模式的重大更新。 用户现在可以在三种不同的模型级别之间自由切换：Opus、Sonnet 和 Haiku。 语音模式将默认根据文本聊天中使用的最后一个模型自动匹配最快的版本。

从简单的语音升级为全能助手

Claude 语音模式于去年首次推出，之前默认由更快但有限的 Haiku 模型驱动。 虽然响应速度很快，但不适合处理复杂的任务。 此升级显着提高了长时间对话的性能。 官方表示，新的语音模式可以针对用户的沟通方式提供有针对性的反馈，帮助用户练习客户推销，甚至共同制定产品市场研究计划。 更大的亮点是能够与应用生态系统集成。 系统可以直接调用Gmail、Google Calendar、Slack、Canva、Notion等第三方应用。 用户可以通过语音命令在 Notion 中更新会议安排、起草电子邮件或创建新文档。

相比之下，OpenAI虽然更新了语音的语气和表达风格，但仍然无法直接调用外部工具来协作进行实际工作。 语言支持方面，克劳德语音模式目前支持英语、法语、德语、日语、韩语等十种语言，用户需要手动切换到指定语言。 新的语音模式现已可供所有平台的 Beta 测试用户使用。 免费用户只能使用俳句模型并最多连接一个外部应用程序。 不过，Anthropic 在本次更新中并没有改变底层语音架构，也没有透露具体的语音技术栈。 自然对话体验（例如中断处理）可能没有实质性改进。
